socket.description: Unix domain socket settings for client connections.

dwell_click.description: Controls whether clients may enable dwell click behavior.

path.description: Path to the Unix domain socket. Defaults to `/run/openergo.sock`.

user.description: User (name or UID) to own the socket at the configured path.

group.description:
Group (name or GID) to own the socket at the configured path. If set
with `user`, overrides the user's primary group.

allow.description: Whether clients are allowed to configure dwell click behavior.

auto_detect.description: Whether to auto-detect keyboards, mice, and touchpads. Defaults to `true`.

include.description:
Devices to include (in addition to auto-detected, or as the sole set if
`auto_detect` is false). Keyed by a friendly label used in logs.

exclude.description:
Devices to exclude from monitoring. Takes precedence over both
auto-detected and included devices. Keyed by a friendly label used in
logs.

DeviceMatcher.title: DeviceFilter
DeviceMatcher.description:
Matches a device by path and/or udev properties. All specified fields must
match (AND logic). At least one field must be set.

path.description: Device path: matched against DEVNAME and DEVLINKS.

name.description: Matched against the evdev device name (udev `NAME` property).

exclude.description:
Friendly device labels to ignore when computing usage. Each label must
already be configured under `[devices.include]` or `[devices.exclude]`.

default_pointer_hand.description:
Default hand used for pointer devices that do not have an explicit
per-device usage configuration.

devices.description:
Per-device usage classification. Keys must reference labels configured
under `[devices.include]` or `[devices.exclude]`.

HandConfigValue.title: Hand
HandConfigValue.description: Physical hand used for pointer or keyboard classification.

hand.description:
Hand that operates this device. For pointer devices this controls click,
drag, and scroll classification; for keyboards it can also select a
derived all-left or all-right key profile when `key_profile` is omitted.

key_profile.description: Keyboard profile used to classify key usage for this device.

key_overrides.description:
Per-key classification overrides keyed by evdev key code name, for
example `KEY_SPACE`.

KeyProfileConfigValue.title: KeyProfile
KeyProfileConfigValue.description: Keyboard profile used to classify key codes by hand.

oneOf.description: ANSI QWERTY layout split between left and right hands.
Do not classify keys from this device.

KeyOverrideValue.title: HandClassification
KeyOverrideValue.description: Classification override for a single key code.

oneOf.description: Classify the key as neither left nor right hand.
